selection1.name: Harvard Large Moleskine Notebook
selection1.description: The Harvard Moleskine Notebook is back, with a stronger cover and more pages! Record your best ideas with class in the Harvard Moleskine Notebook. Whether it is your latest masterpiece sketch, outlines for your next research paper, or algorithms that can change the world, all of your best ideas have a home in a Moleskine.
